name: jeriko
description: Unix-first CLI toolkit for AI agents — commands replace proprietary tool abstractions

scripts.build: bun build src/index.ts --compile --minify --bytecode --external qrcode-terminal --external link-preview-js --external jimp --external sharp --external playwright-core --external electron --outfile=jeriko
scripts.build:darwin-arm64: bun build src/index.ts --compile --minify --bytecode --external qrcode-terminal --external link-preview-js --external jimp --external sharp --external playwright-core --external electron --target=bun-darwin-arm64 --outfile=dist/jeriko-darwin-arm64
scripts.build:darwin-x64: bun build src/index.ts --compile --minify --bytecode --external qrcode-terminal --external link-preview-js --external jimp --external sharp --external playwright-core --external electron --target=bun-darwin-x64 --outfile=dist/jeriko-darwin-x64
scripts.build:linux-arm64: bun build src/index.ts --compile --minify --bytecode --external qrcode-terminal --external link-preview-js --external jimp --external sharp --external playwright-core --external electron --target=bun-linux-arm64 --outfile=dist/jeriko-linux-arm64
scripts.build:linux-x64: bun build src/index.ts --compile --minify --bytecode --external qrcode-terminal --external link-preview-js --external jimp --external sharp --external playwright-core --external electron --target=bun-linux-x64 --outfile=dist/jeriko-linux-x64
scripts.build:windows-x64: bun build src/index.ts --compile --minify --bytecode --external qrcode-terminal --external link-preview-js --external jimp --external sharp --external playwright-core --external electron --target=bun-windows-x64 --outfile=dist/jeriko-windows-x64.exe
scripts.build:all: bun run build:darwin-arm64 && bun run build:darwin-x64 && bun run build:linux-arm64 && bun run build:linux-x64 && bun run build:windows-x64
